title: oenothera tetragona var. velutina
intro: Oenothera tetragona var. velutina, also known as Velvet Evening Primrose, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Onagraceae family. It is native to the mountainous regions of the western United States and has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is rich in vitamins, minerals, and antioxidants, which provide health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as supporting heart health and skin health. Velvet Evening Primrose can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, allowing individuals to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
